title: Crown of Salt - Confrontation and Reckoning Arc Teaser Video
prompt: Story: Crown of Salt (crown-of-salt) | Hook: A relic-smuggling cartel launders artifacts through a city that disappears at dawn tide. | Subgenre: occult conspiracy | Tone: CINEMATIC | Location: Port authority archives and salt catacombs | Villain: The Salt Regent | Villain worldview: Order comes from controlled sin, not clean law. | Motifs: salt crowns, wet ledgers, cargo seals. Arc focus: Confrontation and Reckoning. Produce teaser clip with coherent world continuity, practical lighting, and one clear clue motif transition.
negativePrompt: Avoid low frame-rate jitter, avoid compression artifacts, avoid incoherent camera cuts, avoid on-screen logos/watermarks.
